esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-prometheusreceiver.otel-*
// Replicas that stopped serving to avoid hanging; requires investigation
| WHERE metrics.kv_replica_circuit_breaker_num_tripped_replicas IS NOT NULL
  AND metrics.kv_replica_circuit_breaker_num_tripped_replicas > 0
| STATS tripped = MAX(metrics.kv_replica_circuit_breaker_num_tripped_replicas)
  BY resource.attributes.service.instance.id, attributes.node_id
| SORT tripped DESC
